competitors.name: ts-run-types (type)
ts-run-types (schema)
competitors.source:
() =>
    createValidate(
      RT.exclude(
        RT.union([
          RT.object({kind: RT.literal('circle'), radius: RT.number()}),
          RT.object({kind: RT.literal('square'), x: RT.number()}),
          RT.object({kind: RT.literal('triangle'), base: RT.number(), height: RT.number()}),
        ]),
        RT.object({kind: RT.literal('circle')})
      )
    )

competitors.name: typia
typebox
zod
competitors.source:
c(z.union([
    z.object({kind: z.literal('square'), x: z.number().finite()}),
    z.object({kind: z.literal('triangle'), base: z.number().finite(), height: z.number().finite()}),
  ]))
